title: Frontier handles scores with no feedback samples
description:
As a procedure user, I want model frontier runs on scores with no recent feedback samples to complete with no_data rows, so that an empty feedback window does not fail the whole procedure.

Feature: Model frontier no-feedback handling

Scenario: Score has no feedback samples
Given a model frontier run for a score with zero feedback-derived labeled samples
When variants are planned successfully
Then the procedure does not dispatch feedback-backed evaluations for those variants
And each affected row reports status no_data with an explanatory error
And the procedure finalizes successfully with report metadata.

Scenario: Score has some feedback samples
Given a model frontier run where feedback-derived rows exist below the regression minimum
When variants are evaluated
Then the feedback-backed evaluation still runs
And the regression evaluation is skipped for insufficient regression dataset size.
